claims.claim: The optimal battery pack temperature range is 20°C to 50°C with a temperature difference ΔT less than 5°C.
claims.quote:
maintain the battery pack within the optimal temperature range of 20
C to 50
C with a temperature difference (ΔT) of less than
5
C

claims.claim: The proposed liquid-PCM hybrid BTMS uses spatial network flow channels for 26,650 lithium batteries with an external diameter of 26 mm and height of 65 mm.
claims.quote:
a liquid-PCM hybrid BTMS with a spatial network flow
channel is proposed for 26,650 lithium batteries (with an external
diameter of 26 mm and a height of 65 mm).

claims.claim: Commercial PCM-A-42 paraffin wax was selected as the PCM, and the coolant is pure water.
claims.quote: commercial PCM-A-42 paraffin wax were selected... The coolant is pure water.

claims.claim: PCM in Table 1 has a phase change temperature of 41 to 44 °C and latent heat of phase change of 270,200 J/kg.
claims.quote:
Phase change temperature

(

C)

41 to 44

Latent heat of phase change

(J/kg)

270,200

claims.claim: When the maximum coolant flow rate is 0.12 m/s, the maximum Reynolds number for water is 477.7, which is significantly lower than the turbulent threshold (about 2300), so the flow is laminar.
claims.quote:
when the maximum flow rate of the coolant is 0.12 m/s,
the maximum Reynolds number for water is 477.7. This value is
significantly lower than the commonly accepted threshold for turbulent
flow (Reynolds number of approximately 2300). Therefore, it can be
confirmed that the flow state of water at this flow rate is laminar.

claims.claim: The battery thermal management system should control battery temperature within 20–50 °C and keep the temperature difference within 5 °C.
claims.quote:
control the  battery  temperature  during  the  ideal  work  temperature  range  of 
20–50 

C, and keep the temperature difference within 5 

C

claims.claim: The battery module consists of 16 lithium-ion 18650 batteries with nominal capacity 2.0 Ah, nominal voltage 3.7 V, and internal resistance 45 mΩ.
claims.quote:
the battery  module  consists  of  16  lithium-ion 
batteries  of  type  18,650  with  nominal  capacity  of  2.0  Ah,  nominal 
voltage of 3.7 V and internal resistance of 45 mΩ.

claims.claim: The overall size of the BTMS is 97 × 97 × 65 mm.
claims.quote:
The overall size of BTMS is 
97 × 97 × 65 mm.

claims.claim: A total of 9 liquid cooling flow channels are arranged in parallel, with inner diameter 4 mm and outer diameter 6 mm.
claims.quote:
A total of 9 liquid cooling flow channels are arranged 
in  parallel  with  the  inner  and  outer  diameters  of  4  mm  and  6  mm 
respectively.

claims.claim: The PCM used in this study is paraffin RT44HC with melting temperature of 41–44 °C.
claims.quote:
The PCM used in this study is paraffin RT44HC with melting tem-
perature of 41–44 

C
